DELETE COMPANY.HAS FUTURE EXPIRES DATA: As there is a valid contract with Ogulo until {{ end_date }}, it is not possible to delete the company before expiration. Please contact our Success Team.
DELETE COMPANY.HAS VALID CONTRACT: Since there is a valid contract with Ogulo, it is not possible to delete the company. Please contact our Success Team.
DELETE COMPANY.MAIN DESCRIPTION: Please confirm that you want to permanently and irreversibly delete the company {{company_name}}. Note that {{count_tours}} tours, {{count_visitors}} visitors, and {{count_team_members}} team members will be irreversibly deleted!
DELETE COMPANY.MAIN ERROR 1: The name must match the company name of your account
DELETE COMPANY.MAIN ERROR 2: The company name is required to confirm deletion
DELETE COMPANY.MAIN HINT: Confirm the operation by entering your company name.
DELETE COMPANY.MAIN WARNING: Warning: This action cannot be undone!

ERRORS.GENERAL ERROR DESC: We're sorry, but an error occurred. Please close the dialog and try again.
ERRORS.GENERAL ERROR 11400 DESC: Sorry, but we couldn't find this company. Please try again.
ERRORS.GENERAL ERROR 11432 DESC: Sorry, but you do not have the necessary permissions to delete the company.
